files.wii-saves/readme.txt:
Wii Save Data SD Card
=====================

These are Wii save data files copied from ASHMAN's Wii console.

Compatible with:
- Nintendo Wii (via SD slot)
- Samsung BN59 USB Reader

Contents:
- Mario Kart Wii (RZDE01)
- New Super Mario Bros Wii (RMCE01)
- Super Smash Bros Brawl (RSBE01)
- Wii Sports Resort (RZTJ01)
- Zelda Twilight Princess (SZBE01)

All saves created using the official Nintendo Wii Save Data Manager.
